title: Hosted UI login UX + cloud auth bootstrap for console
description: Implement Cognito Hosted UI PKCE login UX for cloud console, add auth bootstrap endpoint, and guard cloud routes while preserving local mode behavior.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Implemented cloud auth bootstrap + Hosted UI PKCE frontend adapter wiring in console app and lambda routes.
Evidence: New /api/auth/bootstrap handlers in console_lambda+console_local, frontend cloudAuth adapter + authenticated fetch/SSE query path, npm typecheck/build + cargo test + infra pytest/synth all passing.
Next: run browser login callback smoke in deployed env and verify tenant-claim mismatch UX handling.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Auth UX/bootstrap implementation landed and pushed.
Evidence: commit 385d623 on dev; auth bootstrap routes + frontend PKCE adapter integrated; npm typecheck/build, cargo test, infra pytest/synth green.
Next: run deployed browser login redirect/callback smoke and confirm tenant mismatch 403 UX.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Progress: Browser Hosted UI live validation is queued but cannot execute against new code until stack is recoverable/deployed.
Evidence: stack KanbusCloudFoundation is UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED and cannot be recovered from this principal due ContinueUpdateRollback AccessDenied.
Next: resume login/callback and tenant mismatch browser smoke immediately after stack recovery.
Risk/Blocker: BLOCKED on CloudFormation recovery IAM permission.
